LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.description: Medicinal flower harvested from broc flower plants. Used in healing powders.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Broc_Flower.label: broc flower
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.description: Seeds and flesh harvested from buffalo gourd plants. Edible in a pinch.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Buffalo_Gourd.label: buffalo gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.description: A sweet, nutritious root vegetable harvested from carrot plants. A staple food in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot.label: carrot
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.description: Delicate flower harvested from wild carrot plants. Used for propagation and as a rare treat.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Carrot_Flower.label: carrot flower
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.description: A tart, red berry harvested from cranberry plants. Used in preserves and survivor meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Cranberry.label: cranberry
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.description: Sweet, starchy fruit harvested from banana yucca plants. A staple for survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Banana_Yucca.label: banana yucca fruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.description: Edible fruit harvested from barrel cactus. Provides hydration and nutrition.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Food_Barrel_Cactus.label: barrel cactus fruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.description: Mutated fungus harvested from glowing mushroom plants. Emits a faint glow and may be mildly radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Glowing_Mushroom.label: glowing mushroom
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.description: A versatile vegetable harvested from gourd plants. Edible and useful as a container.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Gourd.label: gourd
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.description: Sweet pods harvested from honey mesquite shrubs. Used for food, fuel, and medicine.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Honey_Mesquite.label: honey mesquite pod
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.description: A spicy pepper harvested from jalapeno plants. Adds heat to wasteland recipes.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Jalapeno.label: jalapeno
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.description: Hearty ears of maize harvested from maize plants. A key ingredient in survivor meals.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Maize.label: maize
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.description: A sweet, juicy fruit harvested from melon plants. Prized for its refreshing taste.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Melon.label: melon
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.description: Tough fronds harvested from mutated fern plants. Sometimes used in makeshift remedies.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutated_Fern.label: mutated fern frond
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.description: A genetically modified fruit harvested from mutfruit trees. Sweet and tangy.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Mutfruit.label: mutfruit
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.description: Sweet sap and fibrous leaves harvested from Nevada agave. Used for food, drink, and crafting.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Nevada_Agave.label: nevada agave
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.description: Edible pads and sweet fruit harvested from prickly pear cactus. Vital for desert dwellers.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Prickly_Pear.label: prickly pear
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.description: Tough stalks and nutritious seeds harvested from razorgrain plants. Used for bread and porridge.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Razorgrain.label: razorgrain
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.description: Protein-rich beans harvested from siltbean plants. Thrives in poor soil.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Siltbean.label: siltbean
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.description: Mutated berry harvested from tarberry plants. Sweet and mildly radioactive.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tarberry.label: tarberry
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.description: A hybrid tuber harvested from tato plants. Hearty and tangy.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Tato.label: tato
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.description: Gnarled root harvested from xander root plants. Highly valued for its medicinal properties.
LanguageData.FCP_Raw_Xander_Root.label: xander root
